headline: Procter And Gamble Showcases Zevo Kitchen Push And Investor Considerations
summary: Procter & Gamble (NYSE:PG) is promoting its Zevo insect control brand through a new partnership with culinary personality Antoni Porowski. The collaboration focuses on showcasing Zevo products in kitchen settings and uses influencer marketing alongside experiential campaigns. The initiative aims to reach consumers through digital and social channels, especially younger and more online focused households. For a consumer staples group like Procter & Gamble, household and home care brands...

headline: Russell 1000 Dividend ETF Hits $125 as Johnson & Johnson Leads The Safety Test
summary: The SPDR Russell 1000 Yield Focus ETF (NYSEARCA:ONEY) harvests income from large-cap American stocks by screening the Russell 1000 for companies combining high yield with quality and low financial risk. With ONEY trading near $125 and up about 20% over the past year, the question for holders is whether the distributions backing that performance are ... Russell 1000 Dividend ETF Hits $125 as Johnson & Johnson Leads The Safety Test
